metadata.description: Marketplace hosting the Maltego MCP investigation copilot plugin.

plugins.name: maltego-mcp
plugins.description: AI-assisted Maltego CE investigation copilot: build/expand .mtgx graphs, run OSINT transforms (VirusTotal, Shodan, SecurityTrails, Censys, Hunter.io, HIBP), score and reason over findings, record investigation memory, and generate reports.
